inputs.domain_knowledge: How to author a new agentic-flows flow end-to-end and pass every flowctl validator.
inputs.trigger: When a contributor wants to add a new reusable flow.

expected_outputs.skill:
# Authoring a flow
Trigger: adding a reusable flow. Instructions: write flow.yaml + README + sample + run + adapter-smoke; run flowctl validate/validate-samples/validate-run/validate-adapter-smoke/release-check. Assets: the feature-implementation flow as a template.

examples.then: flowctl validate passes and report shows 0 issues

notes: Captures repeated authoring knowledge into a skill with triggers, instructions, and examples.
